remarks: Welcome to 43 Soundview Avenue #4! This spacious and versatile condo features an open-concept main living area with hardwood floors and an updated kitchen complete with granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, abundant cabinetry, and a large center island perfect for entertaining. The flexible floor plan offers two generously sized bedrooms, including a sun-filled primary bedroom with a skylight and loft! The finished lower level includes a kitchen, full bath, and versatile space ideal for guests, a home office, gym, or recreation area. Garage has been converted into a separate finished space that provides additional flexibility for a studio, hobby room, office, or fitness space. Step outside to the two tiered expansive rear deck, perfect for relaxing or entertaining. Conveniently located near shopping, dining, transportation, and Norwalk's amenities, this unique home offers exceptional space and versatility rarely found in condo living.   Unit has #1 on Exterior
